context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 targeted SEO/accessibility fixes verified. The og:image was incorrectly set to 'background_new2.png' in the index.html routeMeta for the '/' route. Fixed to 'og-cover.png'. All FAQ buttons have correct minHeight (48px) and padding (12px 16px). Trust badge containers have minHeight 44px with flex+center alignment. Single h1 in HomeHero.jsx. All h2 headings appear once each.
